---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.


## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Place/Break/Use '...'
4. See error


## ✅ Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen instead?


## 💥 Actual Behavior
What actually happens?

## 📂 Versions
- **UBM Version:** e.g. UBM 1.2.0 (Forge 1.12.2)  
- **Forge Version:** e.g. 14.23.5.2860  
- **Java Version:** e.g. Java 8u361 (64-bit)  
- **Other Mods Installed:**  

## 🪵 Logs / Crash Reports
Please provide logs if applicable.  
- Paste directly inside a code block (```)  
- Or link via [Pastebin](https://pastebin.com) / [Gist](https://gist.github.com)

## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I am using the **latest release** of UBM.  
- [ ] I have searched the **existing issues** to make sure this is not a duplicate.  
- [ ] I have provided a **full crash log** (if applicable).
